help.three_d_printers.enabled: Enables the 3D printer integration so the agent can inspect configured printers.
help.three_d_printers.readonly: Keeps printer access read-only. Start, pause, resume, cancel, and light changes are blocked while this is active.
help.three_d_printers.default_printer: Printer ID used when the agent does not specify one.
help.three_d_printers.elegoo_enabled: Enables the SDCP integration for Elegoo Centauri Carbon printers.
help.three_d_printers.elegoo_printers: Add printers reachable from the AuraGo host or Docker container on the local network.
help.three_d_printers.printer_id: Stable short ID the agent uses, for example lab-printer.
help.three_d_printers.printer_name: Friendly name shown in the UI and tool results.
help.three_d_printers.printer_url: Local SDCP WebSocket URL, for example ws://192.168.6.50/websocket.
help.three_d_printers.mainboard_id: Optional SDCP mainboard ID. Leave empty unless your printer requires it.
